events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Ringo's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums, or perhaps one of his solo hits?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite Brian May guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still rocking! Happy birthday to the incredible Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Rolling Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: MTV, Music Television, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: MTV's Birthday
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever! 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was the first clip played. What's your most memorable music video moment?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis's debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'! A game-changer for British music. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a three-day festival of 'Peace & Music', began on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, the legendary Woodstock Festival kicked off! Three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation. Which artist would you have loved to see there?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death (1977)
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Tribute to The King
angles.copy: On this day in 1977, we lost the King, Elvis Presley. His music continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death (1996)
events.blurb: Remembering the influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was shot dead in Las Vegas on this day in 1996.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: 30 years since the music world lost Tupac Shakur. His legacy in hip-hop remains undeniable. Which of his tracks still resonates with you today?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death (1970)
events.blurb: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, one of music's most influential guitarists, who passed away on this day in 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: On this day in 1970, we lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix. His innovative guitar work changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, and in the US on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is as legendary as the music within. What's your standout track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and style are truly iconic. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The iconic Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment, solo or Oasis?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single on October 11, 1971, from his album of the same name.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released the powerful and enduring 'Imagine'. A song that still inspires hope and peace. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, and it was released on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod's Birthday
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple changed how we listened to music forever. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Celebrating James Bond Day, marking the 64th anniversary of the release of the first Bond film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling car chases, 007 has it all. Who's your favourite Bond and what's the best Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire. What's his most impactful song for you?
